violations.text: Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (sauce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black and brown residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. See disposal. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025

The door to the outside, located in the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025
Splash guard is needed on the side of the mop sink. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025
Prep unit located in the back area was not in good repair, inspector observed missing lid. Per interview with PIC, lid has been ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025
The wall behind prep sink is in poor repair, observed hole. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025
The ceiling in the ware washing area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025
